title: Completely transformed my mornings
body: I've tried so many similar products over the years and nothing has come close. This one actually does what it says on the tin. My skin feels noticeably softer after just two weeks and I've had three people ask what I've changed. The scent is subtle, not overwhelming, which is perfect for daytime use. Will be a permanent fixture in my routine.

title: Great but packaging let me down
body: The product itself is genuinely impressive — you can feel it working within days. My only gripe is the pump dispenser. It kept getting clogged and I had to decant the whole thing into a different bottle. Annoying given the price point. Sorted now and I love using it every day. Just wish they'd sort out the packaging.

title: Worth every penny
body: I was sceptical at first — the price made me hesitate for weeks. But I'd tried the cheaper alternatives and none of them delivered results. This is the real deal. After a month my partner actually noticed without me saying anything. That, for me, is the true test. Buying my third bottle now.

title: Didn't work for me at all
body: Really disappointed. I used this every day for six weeks following the instructions to the letter and saw absolutely zero difference. Expensive lesson. Possibly works for some skin types but did nothing for mine. I've gone back to my old routine. Contacted customer service and they were unhelpful — essentially said tough luck.

title: Noticeable difference in just 10 days
body: I bought this after seeing it recommended on a skincare forum and I'm so glad I did. Day 10 and I can already see a real change in my skin texture. It absorbs quickly, doesn't feel greasy, and my makeup sits so much better on top now. I've already recommended it to four friends.

title: Pump stopped working after 3 weeks
body: Like others have said, the pump is a serious design flaw. Mine completely seized up at the three-week mark with still over half the product left. I couldn't get it out without cutting open the bottle. The formula itself smells lovely and my skin did feel better while I was using it, but this packaging issue is unacceptable.

title: Finally something that actually works
body: I've been searching for something like this for years. My skin was always looking dull and tired no matter how much water I drank or sleep I got. Two weeks in and I genuinely look more awake. My complexion is clearer and brighter. I feel like myself again. This isn't just a product — it's given me a bit of my confidence back.

title: Lovely texture but short-lived results
body: The texture is absolutely beautiful — silky and light. And I did notice a difference in the first two weeks. The problem is that the improvement plateaued and then seemed to reverse slightly when I ran out and had to wait for my next order. Makes me think it only works while you're actively using it. Fine but not the transformative product the marketing suggests.

title: Sensitive skin friendly — finally!
body: I have very reactive skin and most products cause me to flare up. I did a patch test first and then introduced this slowly. Absolutely no reaction and my skin has responded brilliantly. It's rare to find something that works for sensitive skin types. I've been using it for two months now and genuinely love it.

title: Overpriced for what you get
body: At this price I expected more. The bottle is tiny — it'll barely last a month if you use it as directed. And I didn't see any meaningful improvement in my skin. I've since read that the key active ingredient is available in much cheaper products. Feels like you're paying for branding. Won't be repurchasing.

title: Husband noticed without me telling him
body: That's my benchmark — if someone else notices unprompted, it's working. Three weeks in and my husband asked if I'd done something different with my skincare because my skin looked 'different, like better'. Job done. I feel much more confident going without foundation now, which I never thought I'd say.

title: Inconsistent batch quality
body: My first two bottles were brilliant. The third one had a completely different consistency — much thicker and harder to spread — and didn't seem to absorb as well. Same product, same instructions. I wonder if there's quality control issues. Will try one more time but it's put me off slightly.

title: Brilliant for my 40s skin
body: In my mid-40s, my skin had started to look really tired. I'd accepted it as just ageing. This has proved me wrong. Within a month my skin has more elasticity and the fine lines around my eyes are visibly softer. I'm not saying it's a miracle but it's the closest thing I've found. Reordering without hesitation.

title: Customer service was awful
body: The product didn't work for me, which happens. But when I tried to return it, the customer service experience was shocking. Three ignored emails, then a dismissive chat response. Eventually got a partial refund after threatening a chargeback. For a premium-priced product this level of support is completely unacceptable. Will never buy from this brand again.

title: Layering it with my existing routine is seamless
body: I was worried it might not play nicely with my other products but it layers perfectly. Goes on under my SPF with no pilling and works fine under makeup too. I've been using it for six weeks now and my skin is consistently clearer. Docking one star only because delivery took ages — not the product's fault.

title: Takes time but worth the wait
body: Don't expect overnight miracles — give it a full month. By week three I was seeing small improvements, by week five it clicked and the results were genuinely exciting. My skin texture is so much smoother now. The patience is worth it if you can stick with it past that first impatient fortnight.

title: Broke me out initially
body: The first two weeks were rough — I had a breakout which I now understand is a common purging response. I nearly gave up. Glad I didn't because by week four it had cleared completely and my skin is now better than it was before. Be warned though: it does get worse before it gets better for some people.

title: Perfect gift — my mum loves it
body: Bought this as a birthday gift for my mum who's very particular about her skincare. She's been using it for six weeks and keeps messaging me to say how much she loves it. Her skin looks genuinely younger in photos. She's asked me to order her another bottle. A luxury gift that actually delivers results.

title: Subscription model is a pain
body: The product is decent but I accidentally signed up for a subscription I didn't realise I was opting into, and cancelling it was incredibly difficult. Three phone calls and two chat sessions to finally sort it. The skin results are fine — not life-changing — but the commercial practices leave a sour taste.

title: Absolutely glowing reviews from my friends
body: I passed a bottle on to two friends after seeing my own results and both are now buying it regularly. One of them said it's the first product that's ever made a visible difference to her skin. We're all in our late 30s and early 40s and this feels like what we've all been looking for. It's become our little group obsession.
